title: global prerequisites
description: Install @types/node as a devDependency and update tsconfig compilerOptions to target ES2021, module nodenext, moduleResolution nodenext, and lib ES2021 as described in justshtml/PROMPT.md.

title: packet 01 treebuilder
description: Tackle packet 01: start removing @ts-expect-error comments in justshtml/src/treebuilder.ts (part 1) by tightening Node/attribute types, adding required nullability, and annotating mutually recursive handlers so the TS errors go away without runtime changes.

title: Remove unused ts-expect-error directives
description: Delete all @ts-expect-error comments that now compile cleanly (selector, html5lib_serializer, smoke/scripts).
